response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including geospatial data (GISCollective) and high-performance systems (Dunnhumby). However, his primary expertise is in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and D, with limited direct experience in modern C++ or Rust, which are critical for this role. His background in routing/navigation systems is not explicitly demonstrated.
strengths: Proven track record in building scalable, high-performance systems (Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies and adapt across domains
concerns: Limited modern C++/Rust experience (primary tech requirement)
No explicit experience with routing/navigation data pipelines
Geospatial work primarily in Node.js/Ember.js rather than systems programming
